Footer.headline: Transparent fees · Manual payments · Admin oversight
Footer.body: No automatic host payouts. All listing and stay payments are traceable with references and optional proof URLs. Operators can override any state.

instructions.safetyTip2: Confirm payment before check-in when possible.
instructions.safetyTip3: Keep proof — receipt, transfer reference, or dated messages.

trust.title: Why book on SYBNB
trust.phoneBody: Phone-verified accounts and clear listing review before the feed.
trust.reviewBody: Short-stay listings pass a SYBNB check — quality and fraud awareness.
trust.manualBody: No surprise card capture. You confirm how you pay, with references and proof when needed.
trust.syriaBody: Built for Syrian cities, neighborhoods, and how people really travel here.

brand.metaDescription: Official social channels, content playbook, and trust cues for SYBNB.
brand.title: Look real. Earn trust.
brand.subtitle: One consistent identity across the product and social — light-touch visuals, honest numbers, and operator-reviewed stays.
brand.socialPagesLead: Link your Facebook Page (required for discovery in many markets) and Instagram when ready.
brand.facebookUnset: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SYBNB_FACEBOOK_URL to your Facebook Page URL — visitors see a button instead of this note.
brand.instagramOptional: Instagram is optional — add NEXT_PUBLIC_SYBNB_INSTAGRAM_URL when the feed is ready.
brand.playbook1: Fresh listings — photo-forward carousel + nightly price + neighborhood.
brand.playbook2: Real deals — featured stays or limited-time nightly rates hosts approve.
brand.playbook3: New platform narrative — manual-first payments, Syria-native cities, operator-reviewed listings.
brand.trust1: Same SYBNB mark + amber accent as the app header.
brand.trust2: Clean photography — real rooms, realistic pricing, no bait-and-switch.
brand.trust3: Human review before listings hit the feed — guests see quality before they DM.
brand.proofBody: We surface live listing totals plus rolling weekly engagement so newcomers see momentum — numbers stay conservative and exclude investor-demo noise.

agents.title: Turn helpers into a small structured team
agents.subtitle: Recruit 3–5 agents who bring listings every day — scripts, groups, and rules included; payouts stay simple for now.
agents.hiringTargetBody: Target: 3–5 active agents at first — enough coverage without losing coordination.
agents.hiringProfile2: Active on WhatsApp and Facebook groups where housing demand shows up.
agents.hiringProfile3: Comfortable talking to people (voice notes + DMs) — hospitality beats perfection.
agents.hireRecruitmentAr:
نحن نكبر منصة SYBNB ونبحث عن أشخاص يساعدونا نجيب إعلانات
فيك تشتغل معنا بشكل بسيط من موبايلك 👍
agents.hireRecruitmentEn: We’re scaling SYBNB and looking for people who help us bring listings. You can work with us in a simple way from your phone.
agents.agentTask1: Find people who already rent nightly stays or furnished rooms.
agents.agentTask2: Send the outreach DM / voice note — same script, personal tone.
agents.agentTask3: Collect photos + checklist answers from the host.
agents.agentTask4: Post via Quick Post / host dashboard — or bundle everything to the operator if faster.
agents.roleBody: Random helpers burn out. A tiny team with shared scripts and WhatsApp groups compounds listing volume without chaos.
agents.offerFree: Now: experience inside a live marketplace + visibility into what converts.
agents.offerFuture: Later: per-listing bonuses and/or a revenue share on bookings — documented when volumes justify it.
agents.recruitStudents: Students — campus chats and alumni networks travel constantly.
agents.recruitFb: People active in Facebook housing / travel groups — where demand shows up first.
agents.recruitFriends: Warm networks — friends-of-friends who rent nightly rooms or furnished flats.
agents.toolsIntro: Use these as-is in WhatsApp or Facebook DMs — tweak the tone to sound like you.
agents.dmBody:
Hey — I’m helping expand SYBNB (short nightly stays in Syria). Host posting is free while we scale.

Do you know someone renting a furnished room or apartment by the night? They can list with operator review so guests find them safely.

If it’s a fit, I can walk them through — or connect them with our team.
agents.dmBodyAr:
مرحباً — أساعد في توسيع SYBNB (إقامات ليلية في سوريا). نشر إعلان المضيف مجاني حالياً مع مراجعة من الفريق.

هل تعرف أحداً يؤجر غرفة أو شقة مفروشة بالليلة؟ يمكن إدراج الإعلان بعد المراجعة حتى يجد الضيوف العرض بثقة.

إذا موضوعك مناسب، أشرح لهم الخطوات — أو أوصلهم بالفريق.
agents.templateBody:
• City & neighborhood (Arabic + English names if possible)
• Property type: room / apartment / villa / chalet
• Nightly price + currency + what’s included (Wi‑Fi, AC, parking)
• Max guests & house rules
• Availability style (always ask dates they reject)
• 5+ real photos (kitchen, bathroom, bedrooms)
• Owner WhatsApp / phone for guest contact
• Honest condition notes — surprises hurt reviews
agents.workflowOptionATitle: Option A — You collect, we publish
agents.workflowABody: Agent gathers photos + answers using the checklist and sends them to the SYBNB operator. We create or polish the listing and run it through review before it goes live.
agents.workflowBBody: Best when the host is comfortable online: create an account, use Quick Post or your dashboard, choose short stay, and submit for SYBNB review. Agents can sit beside the host for the first listing.
agents.agentsRule1: Respond fast — same-day replies keep hosts warm.
agents.agentsRule2: Use the same script backbone — personalize the greeting, not the facts.
agents.agentsRule3: Keep listings realistic — honest photos, real nightly prices, real neighborhoods.
agents.whatsappGroupsIntro: Keep coordination tight — two chats so core ops stay separate from agent volume.
agents.whatsappLead: Coordination happens in WhatsApp — group name:
agents.whatsappFallback: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SYBNB_CORE_WHATSAPP_GROUP_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SYBNB_AGENTS_WHATSAPP_GROUP_URL with your chat.whatsapp.com invite links.

AdminSupplyGrowth.g2Preamble: Seeding, DMs, group posts, after-post share on quick post, and human follow-up. Ops targets below align with the G2 runbook.
AdminSupplyGrowth.fastRepliesBody: Reply to every WhatsApp message quickly. Be helpful and human; that converts outreach into conversations and deals.
AdminSupplyGrowth.title: Supply growth engine
AdminSupplyGrowth.goal: 100+ live listings in 7–10 days — execution playbook (not auto-pilot).
AdminSupplyGrowth.g2Acceptance: G2 acceptance: aim for 50–100 listings in a week, daily back-and-forth, first real interest or payment — track honestly in a sheet.
AdminSupplyGrowth.principle: You don’t wait for listings. You create them. Outreach > code.
AdminSupplyGrowth.tileDesc: Seeding, DMs, group posts — get listings fast.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch1Body: Add 20–30 listings yourself. Sources: Facebook Marketplace, Facebook groups, WhatsApp groups. Use Quick post for each.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch2Body: Facebook posts, property comments, groups. ~20 DMs per day. Copy the Arabic message below — paste and send.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch3Body: If they say yes: you create the listing, send them the link. They share and bring traffic.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch4Body: Post daily in 2–3 groups. Use the template below. Your public site URL is inserted automatically when set in env.

Admin.shellSubtitle: Listings, payments, bookings, payouts, and users — full override.
Admin.listingMessagesIntro: Guest messages from listing pages (ORDER SYBNB-95). Stored in `listing_messages`; legacy inquiries mirror for analytics.
Admin.sybnbAuditIntro: Read-only, append-only log of booking lifecycle actions (no personal data).
Admin.hotelCrmSubtitle: Track every hotel from first contact to paying partner. Ops-only.
Admin.hotelCrmEmpty: No leads yet — add the first hotel above.
Admin.hotelCrmError: Something went wrong. Check login (admin) and try again.
Admin.hotelRetentionSubtitle: Keep partner hotels active and paying — recurring rhythm, WhatsApp-ready Arabic lines, and upgrade framing (featured → premium / hotel featured). Execution stays human-led.
Admin.hotelRetentionCadenceBody: Short personal pings beat long broadcasts — verify traction, surface friction, and confirm calendars/pricing stay accurate.
Admin.hotelRetentionCadenceWindow: Suggested spacing: **{min}–{max} days** between proactive contacts unless the hotel is mid-issue.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpsellBody: Once you see demand signals, propose visibility upgrades — pairing upsell with proof beats cold pitching.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpsellSignal1: Hotel WhatsApp / phone taps logged as `hotel_contact_click` analytics.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpsellSignal2: Stay bookings stuck in `requested` / replies slowing conversion.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpsellSignal3: CRM notes show inbound guest chatter or repeat outreach.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpsellTemplateLead: Use after confirming leads exist — personalize with hotel name and concrete proof.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpgradeBody: Stack upgrades only after trust moments — explain ranking lift using familiar marketplace language.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpgradeFeatured: **Featured** — higher placement vs free listings in browse sorts.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpgradePremium: **Premium** — stronger packaging + ranking bias vs featured alone.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpgradeHotelFeatured: **Hotel featured partner** — SYBNB hotel subscription tier when applicable.
Admin.hotelRetentionUpgradeRanking: Global browse ordering blends denormalized feed score (`sy8FeedRankScore`), photo depth, and freshness — upgrades amplify visibility inside that stack.
Admin.hotelRetentionRelationshipLead: Retention revenue dies when ops feels transactional — commit to:
Admin.hotelRetentionRelationship1: **Personal contact** — named manager on WhatsApp, not anonymous blasts.
Admin.hotelRetentionRelationship2: **Fast replies** — SLA-style responses on operational questions (availability, pricing quirks).
Admin.hotelRetentionRelationship3: **Real support** — escalate bugs, payout confusion, or listing edits same-day when possible.
Admin.hotelRetentionSuccessNote: Outcome: recurring subscription revenue with hotels that trust SYBNB ops — automation can layer later once scripts prove out.
Admin.hotelRetentionCrmBannerHint: Cadence, upsell lines, upgrade ladder, relationship rules.
Admin.semiAutomationSubtitle: Reduce manual drag without surrendering judgment — scripts stay human-led while leadership protects closing quality.
Admin.semiAutomationTemplatesSectionLead: Curated Arabic snippets plus links to deeper SYBNB playbooks — adjust tone per channel before sending.
Admin.semiAutomationTemplatesDmLead: Warm opener for agents verifying appetite — personalize geography and inventory hooks.
Admin.semiAutomationTemplatesFollowLead: Second ping when sellers stall — stacks with hotel retention cadence.
Admin.semiAutomationTemplatesCloseLead: After upgrades or publishing confirmed — reinforce proactive edits.
Admin.semiAutomationDelegateLead: Split cognitive load — agents ship velocity, principals ship accountability.
Admin.semiAutomationAgentsOutreach: Outbound prospecting and partner nurture loops.
Admin.semiAutomationAgentsOnboarding: Intake, listing scaffolding, photo QA basics.
Admin.semiAutomationYouClosing: Commercial closes — upgrades, disputes, pricing escalations.
Admin.semiAutomationYouDecisions: Key decisions — fraud exceptions, policy bends, hero partnerships.
Admin.semiAutomationRepeatListingTemplates: Listing creation — standardized fields and Hadiah-ready imagery checklists — reuse sheet or doc macros until codified.
Admin.semiAutomationRepeatResponses: Responses — saved replies and snippets for WhatsApp and CRM notes — measure adoption before wiring bots.
Admin.semiAutomationRepeatFootnote: Prefer clipboard macros and prefilled forms today; graduate to product automation only after volume proves ROI.
Admin.semiAutomationRuleBody: Codify tooling only after the same manual workflow repeats **≥ {n} times** with stable wording — otherwise you automate churn.
Admin.semiAutomationSuccessNote: Outcome: lighter workload for principals and safer scaling for agents — automation follows clarity.
Admin.revenue10kSubtitle: Planning anchors for Hadiah Link — hotels carry the plan; listing tiers and agent commissions fill the rest. Adjust ASP with Ops before quoting partners.
Admin.revenue10kTargetHint: Stretch vs floor depends on agent upside and pricing discipline.
Admin.revenue10kMixLead: Composite toward ~$10k — validate conversion and ARPA weekly.
Admin.revenue10kMixFootnote: Hotel ASP and attach rates move the model — rebalance mix before locking creative.
Admin.revenue10kStrategy1: Lean hard into hotels — acquisition, renewal, and visibility wins are the main lever toward $10k.
Admin.revenue10kStrategy2: Raise prices gradually only after hosts see measurable leads or bookings — proof before purse.
Admin.revenue10kTiersLead: Three steps hosts understand — keep naming consistent in sales and dashboards.
Admin.revenue10kTierBasicBody: Healthy organic placement — baseline trust and accurate listing quality.
Admin.revenue10kTierFeaturedBody: Boosted discovery and rotation — paid visibility after inventory is solid.
Admin.revenue10kTierPremiumBody: Top exposure slot — reserved for listings that convert; pair with ops QA.
Admin.revenue10kRuleBody: Always deliver results first — demonstrate traction, then invoice or renew. No charging ahead of proof.
Admin.revenue10kSuccessBody: Stable high revenue: predictable hotel ARPA, disciplined boosts, and agent commissions that compound.
Admin.teamSystemSubtitle: Split outreach, conversion, and leadership — predictable cadence beats heroic solo grind.
Admin.teamSystemRolesLead: Small pod before bureaucracy — ranges are hiring bands, not quotas etched in stone.
Admin.teamSystemRoleAgentsBody: Outbound — prospecting, nurture, and qualifying interest before a closer joins.
Admin.teamSystemRoleClosersBody: Commercial conversion — hotel subscriptions and upgrades once threads are warm.
Admin.teamSystemRoleYouBody: Strategy, positioning, and hero deals — stay out of inbox churn.
Admin.teamSystemDailyAgentsBody: {n} outbound contacts per agent per day — logged so closers see clean handoffs.
Admin.teamSystemDailyClosersReply: Own inbound replies tied to revenue — speed beats polish.
Admin.teamSystemDailyClosersClose: Close deals — paperwork, pricing clarity, next step on calendar.
Admin.teamSystemTrainingLead: One playbook reduces drift; iterate quarterly, not daily firefighting.
Admin.teamSystemTrainingDm: DM script — same opener, localized inserts.
Admin.teamSystemTrainingClose: Closing script — objection map + proof hooks.
Admin.teamSystemTrainingFollowUp: Follow-up system — cadence + CRM hygiene tied to SYBNB events.
Admin.teamSystemIncentiveDeal: Commission per closed deal — aligns closers to revenue, not vanity leads.
Admin.teamSystemIncentiveHotel: Bonus per activated hotel — rewards durable supply you can retain.
Admin.teamSystemControlLead: Weekly drumbeat — lightweight metrics beat annual HR theater.
Admin.teamSystemControlTrack: Track performance — outreach volume, reply SLA, closes, hotel activations.
Admin.teamSystemControlPrune: Remove inactive — polite exit beats resentful passengers.
Admin.teamSystemControlFootnote: Pair with SYBNB performance board — same numbers for leadership and ICs.
Admin.teamSystemSuccessBody: Predictable growth with less dependence on you — the system carries Tuesday when you are buried.
Admin.marketDominationSubtitle: Depth before breadth — win Syrian traveler muscle memory city by city, hotel row by hotel row.
Admin.marketDominationCitiesLead: Sequential focus beats scattering ops across every pin on the map.
Admin.marketDominationCityDamascusBody: Must win — density, referrals, and the narrative that SYBNB is alive downtown.
Admin.marketDominationCityLatakiaBody: Tourism corridor — coastal stays and seasonal swings worth disciplined merchandising.
Admin.marketDominationCityAleppoBody: Scale lane once Damascus + Latakia rhythms repeat weekly.
Admin.marketDominationSupplyBody: Target roughly {min}–{max}% of addressable visible hotels live on SYBNB — measured honestly against the same weekly census.
Admin.marketDominationSupplyFootnote: Define “visible” the same way every Monday — OTAs, walk-ins, and WhatsApp referrals.
Admin.marketDominationMoatLead: Software alone swaps cheap — relationships compound:
Admin.marketDominationMoatWhatsapp: Direct WhatsApp lines with hotels — named contacts, not faceless broadcast bots.
Admin.marketDominationMoatSupport: Fast support — outages and payout confusion cleared same-day where humanly possible.
Admin.marketDominationMoatHuman: Real connection — principals drop into chats sparingly but memorably.
Admin.marketDominationHabitQuote: If I need a stay → I check SYBNB first.
Admin.marketDominationHabitFootnote: Repetition beats hacks — remind travelers with receipts after great stays.
Admin.marketDominationEdgeSpeed: Speed — listings onboarded and boosted faster than bureaucratic portals.
Admin.marketDominationEdgeSimplicity: Simplicity — one WhatsApp thread beats twelve tabs.
Admin.marketDominationEdgeTrust: Trust — verified flows + Ops escalation tourists remember.
Admin.marketDominationEdgeLocal: Local presence — agents who speak dialect and geography fluently.
Admin.marketDominationSuccessBody: Hard to replace — a sticky supply roster plus traveler reflex buys local monopoly dynamics.
Admin.pageWeightSubtitle: Hadiah ships lean bundles — slim browse payloads, default React Server Components, and deliberate client islands.
Admin.pageWeightLibs1: Stay on Next.js + Tailwind — decline sprawling UI kits that balloon vendor chunks.
Admin.pageWeightLibs2: Skip gratuitous animation libraries — reserve motion for lightweight loaders (see SYBNB-76 image shells).
Admin.pageWeightRsc1: Render feeds and browse chrome on the server so HTML arrives before hydration.
Admin.pageWeightRsc2: Hydrate narrow islands — maps, offline banners, and filters stay client-side where interaction demands it.
Admin.pageWeightDataBody: Cards ship title, price, geo hints, amenities for badges, plus at most {n} image URL — gallery depth rides on `listingPhotoCount` instead of duplicating storage URLs.
Admin.pageWeightDataPoint1: Descriptions and street notes are omitted from browse JSON — detail pages fetch prose separately.
Admin.pageWeightDataPoint2: Trust + ranking logic still see real photo counts via `listingPhotoCount` synced from Ops ranking.
Admin.pageWeightFetchBody: Listing prose, contact workflows, and booking forms hydrate only on `/listing/[id]` or `/sybnb/listings/[id]` — never bundle them into grid responses.
Admin.pageWeightSuccessBody: Faster first paint and materially smaller JSON payloads — travelers on metered data stay inside the product.
Admin.lowConnectivitySubtitle: Skeletons replace blank grids, search retries before failing, IndexedDB snapshots hydrate offline, and browse stays on client navigation.
Admin.lowConnectivitySkeletonBody: Browse grids render pulse placeholders (`ListingGridSkeleton`) instead of empty chrome — empty states stay copy-driven once results truly bottom out.
Admin.lowConnectivityRetryBody: `fetchWithRetry` issues up to {retries} attempts with backoff delays ({delays} ms) on network faults and transient 5xx / 429 before surfacing cached listings.
Admin.lowConnectivityCacheBody: `persistBrowseSnapshot` saves each successful `/api/search` bundle under `SYRIA_OFFLINE_NAMESPACE` via `@repo/offline` — offline trips read the last snapshot when live fetch fails.
Admin.lowConnectivityNavigationBody: Browse filters call `router.replace`, not hard reloads — deep links stay shareable without nuking JS bundles.
Admin.lowConnectivitySuccessBody: Poor-network travelers keep browsing something credible instead of a stalled spinner.

Admin.dailyExecutionHomeTileDesc: SYBNB ops rhythm — daily targets, weekly reviews, execution rules.
Admin.workflowHomeTileDesc: Listing pipeline, message templates, roles — scale volume without chaos.
Admin.flywheelHomeTileDesc: Listings → trust → repeat — compound growth without grinding.
Admin.agentPerfHomeTileDesc: Weekly targets, tracking, leaderboard — measurable accountable agents.
Admin.revOptHomeTileDesc: Featured tiers, pricing, bundles — grow revenue without starving listings.
Admin.expReadyHomeTileDesc: Standard ops, localization, isolation — expand without fragmenting the stack.
Admin.agentCommHomeTileDesc: Fee-based agent commission formula — sustainable payouts from platform fee only.
Admin.dailyExecSubtitle: A simple loop you run every day to keep supply and bookings growing — checkboxes beat strategy decks.
Admin.dailyExec1Body: Target: 10 listings per day — new posts or meaningful upgrades (photos, nightly price, neighborhood clarity).
Admin.dailyExec2Body: Target: 10 outbound DMs per day — Facebook groups, WhatsApp intros, agent referrals, alumni chats.
Admin.dailyExec3Body: Reply to every inbound message the same day — no silent threads; speed builds trust.
Admin.dailyExec4Body: Push at least one concrete booking forward — a confirmed request, deposit conversation, or firm dates.
Admin.dailyExec5Body: Fix or flag one weak listing — blurry photos, vague city, missing amenities, risky copy.
Admin.dailyExecWeekly1: Review best-performing cities or neighborhoods — route outreach where conversion is real.
Admin.dailyExecWeekly2: Remove or pause misleading listings fast — quality compounds.
Admin.dailyExecWeekly3: Double down on hosts, agents, and channels that produced bookings last week.
Admin.dailyExecRules1: Consistency beats perfection — run the checklist daily, even when tired.
Admin.dailyExecRules2: Action beats thinking — bias to posting and DMs over internal debates.
Admin.dailyExecRules3: Speed beats polish — ship listings live, then iterate from real guest signals.
Admin.dailyExecSuccessBody: Continuous listing growth, steadier booking requests, and fewer stalled chats — because the execution loop never drops.
Admin.dailyExecFooterNote: Playbook only — tracking stays in WhatsApp, admin analytics, and your own sheet. No automation required.
Admin.followUpsSubtitle: Recover guests who showed intent but did not book — tracked signals plus an Arabic WhatsApp template. Fully manual send today; automation is optional later.
Admin.followUpsTrackedListingOpen: Listing opens — SybnbEvent `listing_open` on `/listing/[id]` detail loads.
Admin.followUpsTrackedMessage: Inquiries — SybnbEvent `guest_message` when a visitor submits the inquiry form (`SyriaInquiry`).
Admin.followUpsTrackedFootnote: Stay discovery URLs (`/sybnb/listings/…`) also emit `listing_view` alongside existing analytics.
Admin.followUpsOperatorRhythm1: Review conversations daily — prioritize WhatsApp threads linked from inquiries.
Admin.followUpsOperatorRhythm2: For inactive prospects ~12–24h after first intent, paste or lightly personalize the template below.
Admin.followUpsOperatorRhythm3: Offer alternate listings if inventory fits — conversion beats polite persistence.
Admin.followUpsTemplateLead: Operators personalize tone — template is the recommended baseline.
Admin.followUpsWindowHint: Queue lists inquiries received **{min}–{max} hours ago** — the suggested outreach band.
Admin.followUpsQueueLead: Structured inquiries recently cooled — reopen warmly before they churn.
Admin.followUpsQueueEmpty: No inquiries in this age band right now — check again later or widen outreach manually.
Admin.followUpsFutureNote: Future option — automate reminders via WhatsApp Business API or cron workers once ops validates messaging.
Admin.workflowSubtitle: Handle more volume without chaos — one standard listing flow, clear roles, copy-ready messages.
Admin.workflowStep1Body: Collect property basics through one intake path — address or neighborhood, photos, nightly rate, house rules, seller contact. Flag gaps before anything goes live.
Admin.workflowStep2Body: Publish with accurate geography and amenities. If something is ambiguous, pause or label it clearly instead of guessing.
Admin.workflowStep3Body: Seller confirms accuracy and availability. Fix mismatches the same day — calendar, photos, and pricing must match what guests experience.
Admin.workflowTemplatesLead: Personalize {{placeholders}} — keep messages short and warm.
Admin.workflowIntroBody:
Hi {{name}}, thanks for reaching out about listing your place on SYBNB.

To publish quickly, please send:
• Address / neighborhood
• 5+ clear photos
• Nightly rate and house rules
• Best contact for confirmations

We'll reply the same day.
Admin.workflowFollowUpBody: Quick follow-up — did you get a chance to send the photos and confirm the nightly rate? Happy to do a short call if that's easier.
Admin.workflowClosingBody:
Your listing is live: {{link}}

Bookings will come through SYBNB — please reply to guest messages within a few hours for the best conversion. Tell us if anything needs updating.
Admin.workflowRoleOpsBody: Negotiations, booking pushes, tricky threads, payout clarity — you own revenue outcomes and guest–host alignment.
Admin.workflowRoleAgentsBody: Source properties, run intake, keep sellers responsive, and hand off clean packages — listing quality and velocity sit with them.
Admin.workflowFriction1: Simple forms — one short intake; WhatsApp or voice notes only after the same fields are captured.
Admin.workflowFriction2: Quick responses — same-day replies on inbound; reuse templates so speed does not cost quality.
Admin.workflowSuccessBody: Faster operations from intake to live listing, less confusion — everyone knows which lane they own.
Admin.workflowFooterNote: Playbook only — adapt tone for WhatsApp vs email and local etiquette.
Admin.flywheelSubtitle: Build a continuous loop — each step feeds the next so growth compounds instead of resetting.
Admin.flywheelStrengthen1: More listings daily — steady supply beats sporadic bursts.
Admin.flywheelStrengthen2: Faster replies — same-day threads convert; silence stalls momentum.
Admin.flywheelStrengthen3: Better listings — clear photos, neighborhood honesty, accurate amenities compound trust.
Admin.flywheelRetainLead: After success (booking completed, guest happy, payout on track), send a light check-in:
Admin.flywheelRetainQuote: كيف كانت التجربة؟ فيك تضيف إعلان ثاني 👍
Admin.flywheelRetainGloss: Warm Levantine tone — asks how it went and invites another listing without pressure.
Admin.flywheelRepeatDaily: Every day — keep execution habits alive; small inputs stack.
Admin.flywheelRepeatWeekly: Every week — review what produced bookings and trust, then double down.
Admin.flywheelSuccessBody: Growth continues without pushing hard — the wheel carries itself once each step gets tighter.
Admin.flywheelFooterNote: Playbook only — cadence depends on team size; keep the loop visible somewhere you see it daily.
Admin.agentPerfSubtitle: Make agents reliable and measurable — weekly targets, transparent tracking, and a clear accountability loop.
Admin.agentPerfWeekly1: 20 listings per week — new posts or meaningful upgrades that pass review.
Admin.agentPerfWeekly2: 5 active conversations — seller or guest threads that need velocity this week.
Admin.agentPerfTracking1: Listings added — volume plus quality signals (photos, geography, amenities).
Admin.agentPerfTracking2: Responses generated — outbound replies and follow-ups attributable to the agent.
Admin.agentPerfTracking3: Bookings influenced — requests or stays tied to their sourcing or nurture.
Admin.agentPerfLeaderboard1: Every week — rank agents with stable definitions so comparisons stay fair.
Admin.agentPerfLeaderboard2: Highlight top performers — public shout-outs or agent-chat wins so recognition compounds effort.
Admin.agentPerfFeedbackLead: If an agent is inactive or slipping:
Admin.agentPerfFeedback1: Follow up — one direct message beats silence.
Admin.agentPerfFeedback2: Guide them — scripts, examples, and shadowing until rhythm returns.
Admin.agentPerfRemovalBody: If there is no attributable activity for 7 consecutive days, replace the seat — protect pipeline velocity over loyalty to stagnation.
Admin.agentPerfSuccessBody: An active, accountable team and predictable supply growth — standards stay visible and enforcement stays kind but consistent.
Admin.agentPerfFooterNote: Playbook only — tune targets to city reality; keep metric definitions stable week-to-week.
Admin.revOptSubtitle: Increase income without hurting growth — clearer boosts, smarter timing, and scarcity that preserves trust.
Admin.revOptTierFeaturedBody: Badge plus placement in featured lanes — entry visibility that does not cannibalize premium inventory.
Admin.revOptTierPremiumBody: Above-the-fold placement in city results — highest lane reserved for sellers who need maximum exposure.
Admin.revOptPricingFeatured: Featured — $5 per boost window (tune duration to your city).
Admin.revOptPricingPremium: Premium — $10–15 for top placement during high-demand windows.
Admin.revOptUpsell1: The listing earns interest — saves, views, or inbound messages signal momentum.
Admin.revOptUpsell2: The seller asks for more visibility — pair ambition with a concrete placement tier.
Admin.revOptBundleGloss: Three days of boost at a bundled rate — urgency without eroding floor price.
Admin.revOptSupplyBody: Keep finite featured and premium slots per city or week — scarcity protects conversion rates and prevents banner fatigue.
Admin.revOptSuccessBody: Recurring revenue and sellers who see ROI — boosts tie to real signals so growth stays credible.
Admin.revOptFooterNote: Playbook only — align USD bands with FX and local willingness-to-pay; publish definitions next to checkout.
Admin.expReadySubtitle: Prepare to expand beyond the initial market — one repeatable operating system, localized experiences, and isolated deployments.
Admin.expReadyStandardize1: Same listing structure — schema, fields, review gates, and photo standards everywhere.
Admin.expReadyStandardize2: Same agent workflow — intake, SLAs, leaderboard definitions, and payout clarity.
Admin.expReadyStandardize3: Same pricing model — featured tiers, bundles, and currency handling documented once.
Admin.expReadyLocale1: Arabic — RTL layouts, copy, and seller-facing scripts tuned for local tone.
Admin.expReadyLocale2: English — mirrored UX for mixed audiences and investor demos without forked product logic.
Admin.expReadyDuplicateBody: Clone the deploy with environment swaps — region codes, payment rails, ops contacts — while keeping product behavior identical.
Admin.expReadyModularBody: Syria stays isolated — separate database and deployment boundary — so new regions never bleed data or configuration backward.
Admin.expReadySuccessBody: Ready to scale geographically with a repeatable playbook — expansion becomes rollout discipline, not reinvention.
Admin.expReadyFooterNote: Playbook only — archive architecture decisions where ops can find them before opening a new region.
Admin.agentCommSubtitle: Reward agents per booking without crushing margins — commission comes from the platform fee only, with a guardrailed formula.
Admin.agentCommFormulaLead: Do not use a flat $10 per booking.
Admin.agentCommFormulaRule: commission = min(platform fee, max(10% of platform fee, minimum floor))
Admin.agentCommFormulaNote: Minimum defaults to 3 in the same currency unit as the platform fee (configure via SYBNB_AGENT_COMMISSION_MIN). The outer cap ensures the agent never receives more than the fee collected.
Admin.agentCommExampleBody: Booking total $50 · platform fee $10 (20%). Ten percent of fee = $1; floor = $3 → agent accrues $3 (not $10). Higher fees scale: $50 fee → $5 agent share at 10%.
Admin.agentCommSourceBody: Agents are paid from the platform fee slice — never from gross booking total — so host net and platform economics stay aligned.
Admin.agentCommDb1: Links agent + SyriaBooking; amount matches computed commission when checkout completes.
Admin.agentCommDb2: status: pending → approved → paid (manual payout discipline stays outside automated PSP here).
Admin.agentCommSuccessBody: Sustainable payouts with margins protected — agents participate in real platform economics instead of a blind flat bounty.
Admin.agentCommFooterNote: Playbook only — tune SYBNB_AGENT_COMMISSION_RATE / SYBNB_AGENT_COMMISSION_MIN per currency regime.
Admin.drbrainPredictiveLead: What might happen next — heuristic early warnings only.
Admin.drbrainTotalsHint: {attempts} attempts · {blocked} blocked signals · {apiish} audit rows matching error patterns (24h UTC)
Admin.sybnbPerformanceSubtitle: Daily funnel, geography, and listing-level signals — same primitives as investor KPIs (SybnbEvent + SybnbBooking), excluding investor-demo listings.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceFootnote: Daily buckets are UTC. Conversations = contact taps (WhatsApp / phone) plus "Show phone" reveals (`phone_reveal`). Booking requests = SybnbEvent `booking_request`. Successful bookings = SybnbBooking rows moved to `completed` that day.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceCityTopClicksHint: Last 30 days · tracked listing views rolled up by listing city.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceCityBestConversionHint: Cities with ≥15 tracked views · booking-request events ÷ listing-view events.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceCityConversionEmpty: Need more tracked traffic before ranking conversion.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceListingHint: Last 30 days · views/messages from SybnbEvent; bookings = SybnbBooking rows created in-window.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceListingEmpty: No engagement signals in this window yet.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceWeeklyQ3: What should we double down on?
Admin.sybnbPerformanceRule2: Remove or fix weak listings that waste trust.
Admin.sybnbPerformanceRule3: Duplicate patterns from winners (photos, pricing, neighborhoods).
Admin.sybnbPerformanceSuccessBody: Clear growth direction from daily numbers; weekly decisions sharpen supply quality and city focus.
Admin.investorReadinessSubtitle: Non-demo traction: listings, engagement, geography, and a repeatable demo path — optimized for fundraising conversations.
Admin.investorKpisFootnote: Totals exclude investor-demo listings (`demo_meta`, DEMO titles). Active users = distinct non-demo users with any SYBNB analytics event in the last 30 days.
Admin.investorConversionExplain: Conversion uses booking rows ÷ tracked listing views (all time): {requests} ÷ {views}. Directional KPI — tune instrumentation before external reporting.
Admin.investorActivityFootnote: SybnbEvent aggregates — excludes anonymous spam tied to demo listings.
Admin.investorStoryBody: We launched manually, validated demand on the ground, and built a trust-first marketplace for Syria — operator-reviewed stays, clear payment posture, and direct host–guest contact where it matters.
Admin.investorPositioningBody: SYBNB is Airbnb-grade discovery with a stronger trust system — adapted to Syria: geography-first search, verification signals hosts can earn, and flows that match how guests actually book and pay.
Admin.investorDemoIntro: Walk search → listing → host contact → booking request. Anchors jump to the live widgets when signed in as a guest.
Admin.investorDemoFootnote: Contact and booking require a guest-capable session and listing/host rules — fall back to catalog browse if a widget is hidden.
Admin.investorDemoNoListing: Publish at least one operator-approved stay to unlock deep links for contact and booking request.
Admin.investorDemoAdminLinks: Operator tools: SYBNB analytics & Demo SYBNB remain linked from the admin header.
Admin.drbrainMaintenanceDisclaimer: Runtime-only switches — redeploy or hosting env updates keep protection durable.
Admin.drbrainInvestorDemoRibbon: Demo data — simulated for investor presentation
Admin.drbrainStoryS1: Dr. Brain monitors the platform continuously.
Admin.drbrainStoryS2: It detects payment anomalies before damage spreads.
Admin.drbrainStoryS3: It blocks risky payment and payout flows using kill switches.
Admin.drbrainStoryS4: It creates maintenance tickets for the operations team.
Admin.drbrainStoryS5: Admins acknowledge and approve fixes manually — no silent automation.
Admin.drbrainStoryS6: Investor value: safer operations, lower fraud risk, higher trust.
Admin.drbrainStoryDemoHint: Advances locally only — no database writes or provider calls.
Admin.paymentsMonitorIntro: Aggregated counters and recent audit rows only — no secrets or raw payloads.
Admin.homeListingsDesc: Approve, reject, flag fraud, verify listing fees.
Admin.homeBookingsDesc: Validate guest payments, check-in, fraud flags.
Admin.homePayoutsDesc: Approve and mark paid — no auto transfer in this app.
Admin.homePaymentsDesc: All listing fee lines, methods, references, and manual verification.
Admin.homePromotionsDesc: Featured placements: zones, schedule, payment linkage.
Admin.homeGrowthDesc: Traffic, funnel, attribution, and revenue snapshots (30 days).
Admin.homeAutonomyDesc: Review safe recommendations — no auto messaging or auto pricing.
Admin.homeListingAssistantDesc: Paste authorized text; auto-format fields for Hadiah Link (no illegal scraping).
Admin.listingsIntro: Verify listing fees before publishing. Featured unlocks after FEATURED payment is verified.
Admin.hotelFeaturedHelp: SYBNB-41 · HOTEL listings only · Monthly subscription is tracked offline — flip plan here after payment.
Admin.sybnbFieldAgentHelp: Which agent account gets credit for this stay listing — used for incentives & leaderboard (not the host).
Admin.sybnbAgentsPageSubtitle: Reward plan (manual payouts), contribution tracking, and a rolling 7-day leaderboard.
Admin.sybnbAgentsRewardListingUsd: Per listing brought live (directional): about {min}–{max} USD — tune env before promising cash.
Admin.sybnbAgentsRewardBookingLater: Per booking: small % optional later — not activated in-product yet.
Admin.sybnbAgentsManualPay: Payouts are manual for now — keep receipts tiny and confirmed off-platform.
Admin.sybnbAgentsTrackListings: Stay listings created in the window while attributed to the agent.
Admin.sybnbAgentsTrackBookings: Booking requests (SybnbBooking rows) created on those attributed listings.
Admin.sybnbAgentsAttributionHint: Set the agent email on each stay listing from Admin → Listings; unknown emails are ignored.
Admin.sybnbAgentsLeaderboardHint: Ranking score = listings + 5 × bookings in-window — favors pipelines that convert.
Admin.sybnbAgentsLeaderboardEmpty: No attributed agent activity yet — assign agents on stay listings first.
Admin.sybnbAgentsVisibilityBody: Top agents each week get more shout-outs in WhatsApp groups and first shot at new city pushes.
Admin.bookingsIntro: Mark guest payments, record check-in, escalate fraud.
Admin.sybnbBookingsIntro: Stay category only — booking state, guest payment, and risk flags. Use manual clear after you have reviewed off-platform context.
Admin.sybnbReportsIntro: Guest reports grouped by listing. Review reasons, contact the seller, then mark reviewed or archive if needed.
Admin.sybnbPropertiesIntro: Review deed uploads for high-tier real-estate listings (apartment / house / land). Approve to show the confirmed-ownership badge; reject suspected fraud to queue the listing and flag the seller.
Admin.sybnbPropertiesQueueEmpty: No apartment / house / land listings are published or queued for review.
Admin.sybnbPropertiesNotePlaceholder: Short note stored on the listing row for ops.
Admin.payoutsIntro: Controlled release — approve then mark paid offline. Keep AUTO_PAYOUT_ENABLED false so no automated disbursement runs from this app.
Admin.usersIntro: Adjust roles for operations — admin override always available.
Admin.paymentsIntro: Approve manual transfers and reconcile references before listings go live.
Admin.promotionsIntro: Paid visibility zones tied to verified listing payments where applicable.
Admin.growthIntro: Rolling {days}-day snapshot. Server and client events — not a full BI stack.
Admin.growthRevVerifiedNote: Verified listing payments may be broken out per currency below.
Admin.growthSybnb112Intro: Hadiah share links tag visits with hl_share. Compare attributed listing views to share events and spot listings that convert attention into contacts.
Admin.g4SectionIntro: Use these numbers in your stand-up. Copy the one-line log into a simple sheet. Everything is from live listing data; lead taps are recorded per request after this deploy.
Admin.g4LogLineLabel: One-line log (copy into your running sheet)
Admin.g4LeadEventsNote: WhatsApp and phone taps are counted as growth events (lead_whatsapp, lead_phone) for daily totals. Historical days before that change show 0 in these two columns.
Admin.g4TopCategory: Top category to double down (WhatsApp taps)
Admin.g4TopCategoryBody: {name} — {n} total WhatsApp taps (published listings, all time). Add more stock and outreach here.
Admin.g4TopCityBody: {city} — score {score} (sum of page views + WhatsApp + phone on published listings). Post more and DM locally.
Admin.g4TargetsTitle: Program targets (cumulative new published listings by week of launch — you track the week label)
Admin.g4WeakTitle: Weak listings to fix (10+ views, under 2 lead taps)
Admin.g4WeakEmpty: No listings in this window — good.
Admin.g4WeakHint: Fix: clearer title, realistic price, 1–2 more photos, and turn on “no broker / بدون وسيط” when true.
Admin.g4Principles: No paid ads, no SEO automation: win with fresh listings, WhatsApp replies, and owner sharing. One focused channel beats scattered experiments.
Admin.g5SectionIntro: Pick winners from WhatsApp totals, flood supply there for 48h, then expand only after traction. No paid ads required.
Admin.g5WinnersTitle: Today’s winners (from stats — highest WhatsApp taps, all-time on published listings)
Admin.g5Checklist48h: Next 48h: add 10–15 new listings in the top city, only in the top category (same vertical).
Admin.g5Outreach: Outreach: message sellers and groups only in that city + category — ignore the rest until this pocket wins.
Admin.g5LocalConversion: In that city: keep many listings on “no broker / بدون وسيط”, realistic prices, and short clear titles.
Admin.g5StatListings: Published listings in this city: {n} (aim for {min}+ before expanding)
Admin.g5StatDirect: “No broker” share: about {pct}% of listings in this city
Admin.g5ExpandYes: Traction target met for this city (enough listings + daily WhatsApp activity). Plan the next city.
Admin.g5ExpandNotYet: Stay focused: grow listings and daily taps in this city before opening a new front.
Admin.g5Footnote: Homepage shows a hot-city strip to visitors when the winning city has at least one WhatsApp tap.
Admin.playbook7Subtitle: Run this alongside the Stats / G4 / G5 blocks on this page — about 30–60 minutes per day when you are active.
Admin.playbookT3: +5–10 real WhatsApp conversations (replies that move forward)
Admin.playbookR1Body: From the Stats tab and the blocks on this page, write down:
Admin.playbookR1a: Top city (highest WhatsApp taps on listings) — G5 + G4 on this page.
Admin.playbookR1b: Top category (highest WhatsApp taps) — G4 on this page.
Admin.playbookR1c: Hot supply: {n} published listings with ≥ 10 views right now (proxy for who to pitch).
Admin.playbookR2Body: For each hot listing: 10–24 views → 70k / 150k; 25+ views → 90k / 180k (server enforces caps). Optional owner DM — copy/paste (Arabic):
Admin.playbookR2Template:
إعلانك يحصل على مشاهدات 🔥
ترقيته الآن يعطيك اتصالات أكثر
هل تريد تفعيله؟
Admin.playbookR3Body: Add 5–10 listings in the top city and top category. Fix weak ones: clearer title, realistic price, 1–2 photos, «no broker / بدون وسيط» when true (see the weak list in G4).
Admin.playbookR4Template:
مرحباً، قمت بإنشاء منصة لنشر العقارات في سوريا 🎁
يمكنني نشر إعلانك مجاناً وزيادة عدد المهتمين
هل ترغب أن أضيفه لك؟
Admin.playbookR5Body: For low-view owners, nudge: share the listing on WhatsApp to lift views. (Copy for Arabic users: شارك إعلانك الآن عبر واتساب لزيادة المشاهدات — also surfaced in the owner dashboard.)
Admin.playbookWeeklyA: A) If higher ladder prices still convert similarly, consider raising F1 baselines: FEATURED +10–20k, PREMIUM +20–30k (update config with care — this page does not change prices).
Admin.playbookWeeklyB: B) One city: keep filling until you reach about {n}+ live listings in that city before you split focus.
Admin.playbookReportTitle: What to report back (daily or every 2 days)
Admin.playbookReportHint: Copy the snapshot below (numbers refresh when you load this page), then add «messages sent» manually from your own tracking.
Admin.autonomyIntro: Assist and safe autopilot modes only suggest actions. Nothing is auto-sent to users externally; pricing and payouts are never applied automatically.
Admin.autonomyPreviewHint: GET /api/admin/autonomy/preview?propertyId=… returns a dry-run JSON for admins.
Admin.autonomyGenerateTitle: Generate / refresh recommendations for a listing
Admin.listingAssistantIntro: Paste text you have permission to use (your photos, owner-authorized copy, or manually retyped from other platforms). This tool formats and guesses fields — you always confirm on the publish form.
Admin.listingAssistantLegal: Do not scrape or copy content without rights. Facebook and other networks prohibit unauthorized automation; we never fetch posts for you. Paste only what you can legally publish.
Admin.listingAssistantDailyBody:
MORNING (2–3h)
1) Add listings — target 20–30/day (Facebook groups, Marketplace, Telegram): copy → clean → post on Hadiah Link.
2) Contact brokers — target 20 messages/day.

AFTERNOON (2h)
3) Content — 2–3 short videos (property / price / areas); reuse on Instagram.

EVENING (1h)
4) Engage — reply to all messages, follow up brokers, spot-check listings.

TRACK: listings added · brokers contacted · replies · videos · traffic. If listings < 20, prioritise listings tomorrow.
Admin.listingAssistantImagesLabel: Extra image URLs (optional, one per line)
Admin.listingAssistantFbHint: We do not download the post. Keep the tab open, copy visible text and image links yourself.
Admin.listingAssistantMapHint: Map pin and payment steps are still required on the sell form — coordinates are not guessed here.
Admin.f1RequestsIntro: Owners pay outside the app; match WhatsApp proof to request ID, then confirm. Repeating confirm does not double-count.
Admin.f1M2SectionIntro: Copy, paste, then confirm the payment in the table below. Listings are upgraded on confirm (plan + featured window).
Admin.f1M2FollowupHint: Use the Follow-up filter for pending requests older than 12h.
Admin.f1M2DailyLogHint: Log these numbers in your sheet each day: requests, payments, revenue. Times are server-local day.
Admin.statsIntro: Money, listings, and engagement at a glance. Server-cached; refresh the page to update.
Admin.statsMoneyFootnote: Source: payment requests with status “confirmed” (manual settlement).
Admin.statsF1FunnelIntro: Opened = upgrade surface shown (once per listing per session). Clicked = payment request row created. Confirmed = settled manually after WhatsApp.
Admin.statsF1FunnelHintLowClick: Low open→click: revisit CTA placement, pricing copy, and urgency.
Admin.statsF1FunnelHintLowConfirm: Solid clicks but low confirm: improve WhatsApp proof flow and operator follow-up.
Admin.statsF1FunnelFootnote: “Last 7 days” matches money cards (rolling window). “Opened” counts clients that emit f1_funnel_opened after this deploy.
Admin.statsF1AbIntro: Bucket 0: 50k/120k SYP — bucket 1: 70k/150k. Conversion = confirmed ÷ requests.
Admin.statsF1TierIntro: Tier 0: under 10 views (50k/120k) — tier 1: 10–24 views (70k/150k) — tier 2: 25+ views (90k/180k), capped at 100k/200k. Conversion = confirmed ÷ requests.
Admin.statsF1WeeklyRule: Weekly rule: if bucket 1 conversion ≥ 80% of bucket 0, roll out higher prices: SYRIA_F1_PRICING_MODE=high. Use low for the lower tier, ab to keep a 50/50 test.
Admin.statsF1LadderFootnote: Amount on each request is set from the listing’s public view count at request time. Caps: featured 100k SYP, premium 200k SYP.
Admin.statsF1DecisionYes: Signal: higher price tier looks safe to make default (per rule).
Admin.statsF1DecisionNo: Signal: keep A/B or lower pricing until more volume.
Admin.statsActivityFootnote: “Expired boost” = published listing whose featured end date is in the past. Archive = archived status.
Admin.statsEngagementFootnote: Sums of counters on all property rows (not per-day in this table).
Admin.statsChartBlurb: Max single-day views in this window: {max}
Admin.statsChartHintViews: Each bar is a UTC calendar day, counting public listing views recorded as events.

InvestorDemo.title: SYBNB Investor Demo
InvestorDemo.lead: Polished, isolated preview of short-stay supply, trust, and ops — all demo data only (no LECIPM, no real cards).
InvestorDemo.s1b: Browse the SYBNB feed: operator-approved listings only; paused hosts and fraud flags stay out of the happy path.
InvestorDemo.s2b: Hosts complete phone/identity steps before supply reaches guests; this hub never surfaces internal fraud scores in guest copy.
InvestorDemo.s3b: Request → host decision → (stub) payment — always policy-gated.
InvestorDemo.s4b: Stub intents and production lock keep charges off until product + legal sign-off.
InvestorDemo.s5b: Listings, stays, and payouts are reviewable in admin surfaces — demo rows are prefixed and removable.
InvestorDemo.s6b: The metrics panel below is simulated or limited to demo records — not production analytics.
